UI_optionscreen_KBW_OpenCatalog_Tooltip: Opens the independent Knox Buildworks catalog.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_Debug_Tooltip: Print registry, validation, and network diagnostics.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_PinnedAlignment_Tool: Choose where pinned build recipes are drawn on the game HUD.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_PinnedPositionMode_T: Use automatic HUD placement or drag the pinned recipe HUD manually.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_PinnedOpacity_Toolti: Adjust the background and text opacity of the pinned recipe HUD.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_PinnedBar_Tooltip: Choose which side of the pinned recipe HUD gets the accent bar.
UI_optionscreen_KBW_PinnedContent_Toolti: Choose whether pinned recipes show item and skill icons beside their text.
